description: JoyPixels provides licensed emoji, icon, animation, and font assets for use in websites, apps, media, and marketing. Its site centers on browsing emoji assets, downloading licensed files, and using open-source toolkits hosted externally on GitHub.
summary: joypixels.com exposes a public emoji library web app at https://app.joypixels.com, but I could not find any documented public REST/OpenAPI, GraphQL, MCP, or CLI integration surface on joypixels.com subdomains.
